---
title: "Problem Set 4"
subtitle: Due Friday October 3 at 5PM
editor: 
  mode: source
---

::: callout-important
## Under construction!
This assignment is not finalized. 
:::

## Problem 0

{{< include bank/_music-rec.qmd >}}

## Problem X

{{< include bank/random-variables-discrete/bdj-rv.qmd >}}

## Problem X

{{< include bank/random-variables-discrete/gandalf-test.qmd >}}

## Problem X

{{< include bank/random-variables-discrete/contested-election.qmd >}}

## Submission

{{< include bank/_submission.qmd >}}
